task_completion.description: Calculate the test average for each student.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column N (Test Avg) contains the calculated average of the test scores from columns B, C, and D for each student.

task_completion.description: Calculate the homework average for each student.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column O (Homework Avg) contains the calculated average of the homework scores from columns E, F, G, and H for each student.

task_completion.description: Calculate the quiz average for each student, dropping the lowest score.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column P (Quiz Avg) contains the calculated average of the quiz scores from columns I, J, K, and L, excluding the lowest score (e.g., using a formula like =(SUM(I2:L2)-MIN(I2:L2))/3).

task_completion.description: Reference or copy the participation score.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column Q (Participation) contains the participation scores, matching the values in column M.

task_completion.description: Calculate the weighted final grade for each student.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column R (Final Grade %) contains the weighted sum: 40% Test Avg, 30% HW Avg, 20% Quiz Avg, and 10% Participation.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct letter grade based on the final grade.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column S (Letter Grade) contains the correct letter (A, B, C, D, or F) corresponding to the final percentage in column R, based on the standard scale (A: 90-100, B: 80-89, C: 70-79, D: 60-69, F: <60).

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc application interface, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than manual calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar displays spreadsheet formulas (e.g., AVERAGE, SUM, MIN, IF) for the selected cells, indicating automated calculation.

integrity.description: The agent applied the calculations to all student records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculated columns (N through S) are populated for all 12 student rows, not just the first row.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The spreadsheet contains 12 student records. Columns B-D are Tests, E-H are Homework, I-L are Quizzes, M is Participation. The agent must populate columns N-S using formulas.
- Column N (Test Avg): Average of B-D.
- Column O (HW Avg): Average of E-H.
- Column P (Quiz Avg): Average of I-L, dropping the lowest score (e.g., =(SUM(I2:L2)-MIN(I2:L2))/3).
- Column Q (Participation): Copy of M.
- Column R (Final Grade): (N*0.40) + (O*0.30) + (P*0.20) + (Q*0.10).
- Column S (Letter Grade): A (90-100%), B (80-89%), C (70-79%), D (60-69%), F (0-59%).
Verify that the formulas are correct and applied to all 12 students.
